page_metadata.biotools__summary: Genomicus-metazoa is a genome browser that enables users to navigate in metazoa genomes in several dimensions: linearly along chromosome axes, transversaly across different species, and chronologicaly along evolutionary time.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Genomicus-metazoa is a genome browser that enables users to navigate in metazoa genomes in several dimensions: linearly along chromosome axes, transversaly across different species, and chronologicaly along evolutionary time.
